pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the JDK 11 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 11 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 11.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path construction.
Remove unused import for the deprecated Paths class.
